title: rutidea gracilis
intro: Rutidea gracilis, also known as the slender Rutidea, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as supporting digestive and respiratory health. Rutidea gracilis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
